name: chr20_20q13_33_KCNQ2_SD
description: 20q13.33 subtelomeric SD region around KCNQ2 (voltage-gated potassium channel) and adjacent CHRNA4. Flanked by short SDs of ~10-30 kb and embedded in the 20q subtelomeric SD field; rare recurrent 20q13.33 microdeletions remove KCNQ2 and CHRNA4 together.

architecture.internal_structure: Short 10-30 kb intra-chromosomal SDs at 93-97% identity flanking KCNQ2, CHRNA4, EEF1A2; subtelomeric duplicons shared with other chromosome ends; rare ~400 kb-1 Mb microdeletions reported.
